overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy night in a historic Victorian residential district. The character traverses cobblestone streets lit by warm gas lamps, passes a parked carriage, enters a mansion estate, and explores a rear garden courtyard with a fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with Victorian mansions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone sidewalk beside a large colonial mansion with white columns

entered.detail: two-story mansion with white columns and black wrought-iron balcony railings
wet cobblestones reflecting the warm glow of street lamps
cast-iron street lamp emitting warm yellow-orange light
black iron fence with stone pillars bordering the mansion property
large oak trees draped with Spanish moss silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked cobblestone street in a historic district, passing grand Victorian mansions with white columns and wrought-iron fences. Warm gas lamps cast golden reflections on the wet ground while Spanish moss hangs from distant trees.

events.description: character turns left to cross the street toward the large mansion across the road
passing a parked horse-drawn carriage on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the cobblestone street while approaching a gated mansion

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the street side, stationary in the rain

entered.detail: wooden carriage with covered top and large wheels parked on the street
large three-story Victorian mansion with ornate gables and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street, passes a parked horse-drawn carriage, and turns left to cross toward a large Gothic Victorian mansion with glowing windows. The colonial mansion recedes behind as the character approaches the new destination.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion front grounds and entrance approach

events.description: passing through the wrought-iron front gate into the mansion estate grounds

agents.ego_description: walking up the cobblestone driveway toward the mansion's grand entrance with tall columns

entered.detail: ornate black iron gate with stone pillars marking the estate entrance
curved cobblestone path leading up to the mansion entrance
landscaped garden beds with red flowers along the driveway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the mansion grounds through an ornate wrought-iron gate and proceeds up the cobblestone driveway. The massive Gothic mansion looms ahead with its tall columns and warm entrance lights, surrounded by manicured flower beds.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow side passage between mansion wings

events.description: turning right to proceed along the narrow side path of the mansion

agents.ego_description: moving along the narrow passage between the main mansion and adjacent structures, passing garden beds

entered.detail: brick-paved narrow walkway between the mansion wall and garden fence
dense shrubs and flowering plants along the passage side
smaller auxiliary building with green doors visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the main entrance and turns right into a narrow side passage between mansion wings. The path is flanked by the mansion wall on the left and dense garden vegetation on the right, leading toward the rear grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear courtyard garden with central fountain

events.description: emerging from the narrow passage into the open rear courtyard with fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard examining the fountain and outdoor seating area in the rain

notable_agents.action: figure standing on the mansion rear porch near the entrance door

entered.detail: ornate stone fountain with multiple tiers in the center of the courtyard
white wicker chairs and tables arranged around the courtyard perimeter
two-story rear of the mansion with illuminated windows and back entrance
stone statues and sculptural elements decorating the garden beds
standing lanterns providing warm light around the courtyard edges

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a spacious rear courtyard featuring a central stone fountain, wicker outdoor furniture, and garden statuary. The mansion's rear facade glows with warm light in the background, and a figure stands on the back porch as rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic district that transitions from a public cobblestone street into the private sanctuary of a Gothic mansion's rear courtyard. It begins by trailing the character past grand Victorian homes and wrought-iron fences, where warm gas lamps cast golden reflections across the wet ground. As the character passes a parked horse-drawn carriage, the camera shifts focus toward a looming Gothic estate, following the character through an ornate gate and up a cobblestone driveway flanked by manicured flower beds. The scene then narrows as the camera moves past the main entrance into a tight side passage between the mansion's wings and dense garden vegetation. Finally, the path opens up into a spacious rear courtyard featuring a central stone fountain and wicker furniture, with the mansion's glowing facade and a solitary figure on the porch visible through the falling rain.
